edits.slides.1.content: No structure, no templates, no annotation tools.
edits.slides.3.title: What I set out to fix
edits.slides.5.afterDescription: Everything moved to the header — doctor, clinic, patient, actions inline.
edits.slides.7.content: Two tools for the question doctors kept asking: where exactly is the problem?
edits.slides.7.issues.0: Pen, text, and color tools — annotate at full size
edits.slides.7.issues.3: Patients see which teeth are affected
edits.slides.8.beforeDescription: Three sidebar buttons — Preview, Download PDF, Share via QR. No access control.
edits.slides.8.afterDescription: I replaced them with a full sharing modal — email invites, access permissions, PIN protection, multi-channel delivery.
edits.slides.12.whatWorked.1: The modular block system — customizable structure was the right balance.
edits.slides.12.whatYouCouldntMeasure: Long-term adoption and whether templates reduced variability — needs 6+ months of data.
